text: The sharp lines and glass surfaces give this place a cold, almost clinical air. I feel like a visitor in a space devoted to possibilities, yet also hemmed in by invisible boundaries of technology and order. The R+D wall draws my attention; its vibrant colors and message about coexistence with intelligence awaken my curiosity—what does it really mean to innovate and connect in an age dominated by abstractions? I feel both inspired and slightly uneasy.
